title: Hiring Design in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger hiring design in practice judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Hiring Design in Practice is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Hiring Design in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good hiring design in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Hiring Design in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
